api.name: Checkbox
api.description: Binary input with indeterminate state and accessible label.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name used when Label is not set (the checkbox renders without a visible label). Required for WCAG compliance when the checkbox sits alone in a cell or alongside text that isn't linked to it via for / htmlFor.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, the checkmark draws itself in via stroke-dasharray and the box plays a subtle 200ms scale bounce on check. Default is false.

mdSummary:
# Checkbox

Binary input with indeterminate state and accessible label.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/checkbox

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Checkbox | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Checked | `bool` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | CheckedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | IsIndeterminate | `bool` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | IsIndeterminateChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Id | `string?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name used when Label is not set (the checkbox renders without a visible label). Required for WCAG compliance when the checkbox sits alone in a cell or alongside text that isn't linked to it via for / htmlFor. |
| Checkbox | Animated | `bool` | `` | When true, the checkmark draws itself in via stroke-dasharray and the box plays a subtle 200ms scale bounce on check. Default is false. |
| Checkbox | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Checkbox | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `CheckedChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `IsIndeterminateChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Checkbox />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Checkbox/Checkbox.razor`
